name: client-budget
description: Per-client budget enforcement and quota tracking. Blocks requests when limits exceeded.
author: Pedro Augusto

skills.name: client-budget-status
skills.description: Returns current budget and quota usage for all clients

skills.name: client-budget-reset
skills.description: Resets usage counters for a specific client

clients.description: Path to clients.json config file (default: data/clients.json)
